title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: Celebrity duos tackle culinary challenges set by a renowned chef while engaging in communal activities to captivate viewers with their cooking skills and teamwork.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: Bollywood legend, Dharmendra graces the show with his presence, as the celebrity chefs battle it out to cook the finest punjabi dishes.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: The celebrity contestants face a new challenge as they must prepare shahi phal barfi, shahi korma, and shahi pulao, presenting their creativity and culinary skill.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: The celebrity contestants prepare Sambar and Medu Vada, the South Indian dishes, to impress guest Suniel Shetty.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: With their family among the audience, the contestants team up with one family member to prepare the best 'Chole Bhature' with a hilarious twist.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: The contestants switch partners while challenging each other to prepare a host of popular delicacies. Later, the chefs must prepare 'parathas' with a tangy twist.

title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di
subTitle: Focused Heer encounters privileged Nawab, sparking an unexpected romance. Their journey unfolds amidst challenges, revealing a tale of love intertwined with deception and emotional turmoil.

title: Mangal Lakshmi
subTitle: Mangal sets off on a journey to find an ideal match for Lakshmi. However, love and trials test their sisterhood, unveiling destiny's power.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: Bharti Singh entertains the participants, and Harpal Singh Sokhi assigns the celebrity contestants to prepare masala milk and ras malai.

title: The 50
subTitle: Fifty celebrities navigate competitive tasks and social dynamics within a confined environment, where alliances, strategy and performance determine outcomes.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: With Pasta and Parma Rosa sauce as the theme, the contestants host a pasta party in an effort to excel in the world of exotic cuisines.

subTitle: Laughter and comedy take centrestage as popular internet personality Jannat Zubair Rahmani peforms a hilarious stage play in the guise of a bride.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: An opportunity to use a genie to help the chefs adds an exciting twist to the contest as the chefs employ several ingenious methods to outwit their opponents and emerge victorious.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: When chefs face the challenge of crafting a special Naga Panchami platter, the competition heats up as each contestant strives to impress the judges.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanvi invokes jealousy in Neha by getting close to Rishi. Neha and her sister accuse Tanvi of trying to take him away from her. The issue is settled when Tanvi's sister tells them about her sacrifice.

title: Kasam
subTitle: In an act that's both playful and sincere, Rishi steals the sacred Mehndi and tricks Tanu into wearing it. With the two growing closer through little tiffs and heartfelt encounters, Bani and Neha find the going increasingly difficult.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Despite Tanu's refusal of having any feelings for Rishi, he denies her claims, taunts and harasses her. Meanwhile, Bani eavesdrops on their conversation.
